g.text: Local Storage -

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: How can we persist data after page refreshes / closing and opening browser or tabs when working locally?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Domain or Subdomain

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - we can store persistent data - a long time

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - we have the option to add expiration dates

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5x cubes to Cart

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: user refreshes normally there cart data is lost

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Local Storage

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: save our cart data every time we remove or add

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: an item to the cart

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: whenever the cart page is loaded in the future, we

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: restore that data and the cart is back

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Local Storage is per domain/subdomain - i.e. codecademy.com or bootcamp.codecademy.com

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: You can't access other sites stored values and vice / versa via JavaScript
